ActorFrame.InitCommand: %function(self) update = 1; level = 0; dark = ''; warp = 0; self:queuemessage('Update') end
ActorFrame.MenuLeftP1MessageCommand: %function() if update == 1 and GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) then Decrease() end; end
ActorFrame.MenuLeftP2MessageCommand: %function() if update == 1 and GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) then Decrease() end; end
ActorFrame.MenuRightP1MessageCommand: %function() if update == 1 and GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) then Increase() end; end
ActorFrame.MenuRightP2MessageCommand: %function() if update == 1 and GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) then Increase() end; end

Layer.CheckCommand: %function(self) if world == 1 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 2 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 3 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 4 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 5 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 6 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 7 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 8 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end; end
%function(self) if world == 7 then self:zoom(1) else self:zoom(0) end end
